prompt:
Use case: social ad shot 4 of 6
Primary request: Route planning intelligence: a UK-style store map with selected stops and optimized route sequence appears, showing efficient daily planning under manager constraints.
Scene/background: stylized geographic planning map, no real addresses
Subject: route path, numbered stops, planning panel
Action: beat 1: stops highlight; beat 2: route line draws smoothly; beat 3: sequence badges settle
Camera: top-down map pan with slight zoom
Lighting/mood: clear analytical look
Color palette: midnight blue, cyan, lime, white
Style/format: data-driven operations ad
Text (verbatim): "Smarter field planning."
Constraints: all-ages safe, no real people, no logos, no copyrighted characters
